[GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ALGORITHM IS IMPLEMENTED ON THE LOAD DIGITS DATASET USING SCIKIT-LEARN. CROSS-VALIDATION IS PERFORMED WITH 5-FOLD CROSS-VALIDATION TO EVALUATE MODEL PERFORMANCE. HYPERPARAMETER TUNING IS PERFORMED USING GRID SEARCH CV TO OPTIMIZE THE MODEL PARAMETERS. THE MODEL IS COMPARED TO A MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL FOR PERFORMANCE EVALUATION. THE PERFORMANCE OF THE GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES MODEL IS COMPARED TO THAT OF THE MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL USING THE ACCURACY METRIC.
